title: Adding decimals and whole numbers (tenths)
description: Add whole numbers and tenths like 4 + 5.7

hints: There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we can solve it.

###Place value table

Let's line up the numbers by their decimal places. 

Ones | $.$ | Tenths
- | - | -
$\blueE{4}$ | $.$ | $\blueE{0}$
$\maroonD5$ | $.$ | $\maroonD{7}$

Because $\blueE4$ is a whole number, we can add a decimal point and a $0$ behind to make the columns align.

Now, let's add each place value column.

| Ones | $.$ | Tenths
-| - | - | -
| $\blueE{4}$ | $.$ | $\blueE{0}$
$+$| $\maroonD{5}$ | $.$ | $\maroonD{7}$
| $\underline{~~~~}$ | $\underline{~~~~}$| $\underline{~~~~}$
| $9$ | $.$| $7$

###Decomposing the numbers

We can group the whole numbers together and the decimals together.

$\begin{align}
&(\blueE4 + \maroonD5) + \maroonD{0.7}\\\\
&=9 + \maroonD{0.7}\\\\
&=9.7
\end{align}$
There are many ways to solve this problem. Let's see two ways we can solve it.
